subject: Eelektrik, an electric eel-like creature undulating through an underwater coral reef setting
description: Eelektrik winds sinuously through a vibrant underwater scene. Its elongated body is rendered in yellow-orange and brown tones with a distinctive patterned underside. The surrounding environment is a colorful coral reef with warm orange coral structures and a deep blue water backdrop. Small red accents visible at the sides of its body suggest the distinctive spot markings of the species. The creature's mouth is open, giving an impression of active movement through the water.
background: deep blue water with orange coral structures
